name: Cassique
description: Cassique is a place to play pickleball in Horicon, NY. There are 6 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are private.

name: Crandall Park
description: Come play pickleball at Crandall Park in Glens Falls, NY! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Lake George Country club
description: Lake George Country club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Diamond Point, NY. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Luzerne Tennis/Pickleball court
description: Luzerne Tennis/Pickleball court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lake Luzerne, NY. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free.

name: Murray St Park
description: Come play pickleball at Murray St Park in Glens Falls, NY! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Ridge Jenkinsville Park
description: Ridge Jenkinsville Park is a place to play pickleball in Queensbury, NY. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.
hours: Monday-Friday, 8 am to 4:30 pm 742 Bay Road Queensbury, NY 12804 Phone: 518-761-8216 recreation@queensburyny.gov © 2024 - 2026 All Rights Reserved Log in to MyRec Home About Our Parks Programs Outdoor Recreation Q-Club Aquatics Alerts Downloads What’s Happening Contact Privacy Policy Terms and Conditions Website Design: Lehman Creative Development & Hosting: Nolee-O Web Design

name: Silver Bay YMCA
description: Silver Bay YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Silver Bay, NY. There are 6 wood and hard courts. 2 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Usher Park
description: Usher Park is a place to play pickleball in Lake George, NY. There are 4 hard courts. 2 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: YMCA Adirondack Regional Wellness Center
description: YMCA Adirondack Regional Wellness Center is a place to play pickleball in Chestertown, NY. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play.
